title: Paw Patrol Marshall & Farmer Al Figure Pack with Sheep Toy Figure, Kids Toys for Boys and Girls Ages 3 and Up
features: Adventures Await: Dive into thrilling missions with this action-packed figure set featuring a 6,3 cm Marshall with a movable head and a 10,1 cm Captain Farmer Al with movable limbs
Imaginative Fun: These PAW Patrol toys look just like they do in the show, sparking creative adventures with authentic design and fan-favorite styling
Endless Excitement: Kids will love creating their own heroic tales with these PAW Patrol toys, inspiring bravery and teamwork in every pretend play rescue mission

PAWsome Gifts for Kids: When buying toys for ages 2-4, PAW nursery toys & toddler toys are toys for girls and boys who love toy cars and plushies, as alternatives to dolls, dinosaur toys or a train set
Collect Them All: Expand your collection of PAW Patrol toys for kids with Rescue Wheels toy trucks, PAW Patrol film toys, dragon toys, stuffed animals, toy figures and playsets (each sold separately)
description: Join the PAW Patrol adventure with the Marshall & Farmer Al Figure Pack. Featuring a 6,3 cm Marshall figure and a 10,1 cm Farmer Al figure, each with movable parts, this set is ready for action-packed storytelling. Kids will love creating stories with Marshall, Farmer Al and the included sheep figure, adding an extra layer of fun to the imaginative play experience. Encourage creative play and develop storytelling skills with these engaging toys for kids. Each figure is crafted with authentic PAW Patrol design and look just like they do in the show. With four different story packs to collect, each offering unique characters, the excitement never ends. These PAW Patrol learning toys are PAWsome for a birthday, Christmas, or any holiday. For even more fun, combine with the Fire Rescue Command Center, Rapid Reload Fire Truck and six different Fire Rescue figures and vehicles, so the excitement never ends. (each sold separately) Relive cherished moments from past PAW Patrol seasons, like the Mighty Pups and PAW Patrol Movie, or create new adventures with a PAW Patrol tower, individual PAW Patrol action figures and their PAW Patrol vehicles, for turbo-charged adventures.
